headlines.description: — Caleb Williams hoped he'd get a chance to chat with Aaron Rodgers. He got his opportunity after he led the Bears to yet another close win.
headlines.shortLinkText: Caleb Williams throws for 3 TDs as Bears beat Steelers 31-28 with nemesis Aaron Rodgers sidelined

events.name: New England Patriots at Cincinnati Bengals

headlines.description: — Mike Vrabel's New England Patriots became the first NFL team to reach 10 wins after they held on for a 26-20 victory over the Cincinnati Bengals.
headlines.shortLinkText: AFC-leading Patriots rally from 10-point deficit to beat Bengals 26-20, extend winning streak to 9

events.name: New York Giants at Detroit Lions

headlines.shortLinkText: Jahmyr Gibbs rescues Lions with long TD run in OT for 34-27 win over Giants

events.name: Minnesota Vikings at Green Bay Packers

headlines.description: — Emanuel Wilson always believed he could make it in the NFL even while he was breaking into the league as an undrafted free agent from Division II Fort Valley State.
headlines.shortLinkText: Emanuel Wilson runs for 107 yards and 2 TDs as Packers pound Vikings 23-6

headlines.description: — Both Sam Darnold and the Seattle Seahawks bounced back quite nicely from their first road loss this season.
headlines.shortLinkText: Sam Darnold throws for 244 yards 2 TDs as Seahawks beat the Titans 30-24

events.name: Indianapolis Colts at Kansas City Chiefs

headlines.description: — The Kansas City Chiefs looked much like they have all season for the first three quarters against Indianapolis on Sunday.
headlines.shortLinkText: Chiefs rally from 11-point deficit to beat Colts 23-20 in OT on Harrison Butker's fifth field goal

events.name: New York Jets at Baltimore Ravens

headlines.description: — Baltimore has climbed all the way out of its hole, even if this season still looks laborious for Lamar Jackson, Derrick Henry and the rest of the Ravens.
headlines.shortLinkText: Henry rushes for 2 TDs to help sluggish Ravens to fifth straight win, 23-10 over Jets

events.name: Cleveland Browns at Las Vegas Raiders

headlines.description: — Myles Garrett getting three of 10 sacks by a ferocious Browns defense normally would be the top storyline for a struggling Cleveland team.
headlines.shortLinkText: Shedeur Sanders wins his 1st NFL start, Myles Garrett has 3 sacks as Browns beat Raiders 24-10

headlines.description: — Trevor Lawrence made some great throws, some pretty bad ones and just about everything in between while leading the Jaguars in a back-and-forth game that came down to a few clutch moments in the fourth quarter and overtime.
headlines.shortLinkText: Lawrence throws 3 TD passes, Little kicks 52-yard FG in OT as Jaguars beat Cardinals 27-24

headlines.description: — Dak Prescott wasn't having it when teammates started congratulating Dallas' star quarterback for breaking one of Tony Romo's records as the Cowboys were trying to rally from 21 points down against the defending Super Bowl champs.
headlines.shortLinkText: Dak Prescott rallies Cowboys from 21 down to beat Eagles 24-21 after breaking Tony Romo's record

events.name: Atlanta Falcons at New Orleans Saints

headlines.description: — Kirk Cousins found enough vintage form to lift the Falcons out of their recent funk.
headlines.shortLinkText: Kirk Cousins' 2 TD passes help the Falcons end a 5-game skid and beat the Saints, 24-10

events.name: Tampa Bay Buccaneers at Los Angeles Rams

headlines.description: — Although Matthew Stafford threw touchdown passes on the Los Angeles Rams' first three drives against Tampa Bay, he was even more excited by teammate Cobie Durant's electrifying interception return for a TD, raising his hand atop his head as a...
headlines.shortLinkText: Stafford and Adams connect for 2 more TDs while NFC-leading Rams roll to 34-7 win over Buccaneers
